entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Cenchrus americanus L., the host crop affected by bacterial leaf blight

entities.name: BACTERIAL LEAF BLIGHT
entities.description: A disease characterized by water-soaked lesions and necrosis on leaf tips

entities.name: PANTOEA STEWARTII SUBSPECIES INDOLOGENES
entities.description: The bacterial pathogen causing leaf blight in pearl millet, identified as isolate PPi-M1

entities.name: PANTOEA ALLII
entities.description: A bacterial species distant from P. stewartii subsp. indologenes

entities.name: PANTOEA ANANATIS
entities.description: A bacterial species distant from P. stewartii subsp. indologenes

entities.name: PANTOEA DISPERSA
entities.description: A bacterial species distant from P. stewartii subsp. indologenes

entities.name: MANASAGANGOTHRI REGION
entities.description: The specific area in Karnataka where infected pearl millet was found

entities.name: KARNATAKA
entities.description: A southern Indian state where the disease was observed

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the first report of this disease in pearl millet was made

entities.name: 16S RRNA GENE
entities.description: A gene used for the molecular identification of the bacterial isolate

entities.description: A subspecies-specific gene used to confirm the identity of P. stewartii subsp. indologenes

entities.description: A subspecies-specific gene used to confirm the identity of P. stewartii subsp. indologenes

entities.description: A computational method used to find homologous sequences in the NCBI database

entities.description: A method used to determine the evolutionary relationship of the isolate to other strains

entities.description: A statistical method used for constructing phylogenetic trees

entities.description: A nucleotide substitution model used in phylogenetic analysis

entities.name: PATHOGENICITY TEST
entities.description: An experiment performed in planta to prove the organism causes the disease

entities.description: A specific inoculation technique used in pathogenicity tests

entities.description: Scientific criteria used to establish a causative relationship between a microbe and a disease
